## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots

Please attach a screenshot or screen recording showing the issue.

## Environment

- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 124, Safari 17]
- Device: [e.g., iPhone 15, Desktop]
- OS: [e.g., iOS 17, macOS 14, Windows 11]
